title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants · Structure Brief: Linked Insert Delete
summary: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa linked insert delete increment in a linked structure with diagrammed invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Insert and delete at boundaries while preserving connectivity and size invariants.
Trace singly and doubly linked node references without losing head, tail, or reachability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
